data.body: PASS 1 review (T11 — Data-migration / backfill safety): NOT APPLICABLE / PASS. Cluster 2 is a pure in-file refactor unifying two jittered-backoff helpers in `_advisory_lock.py` into one parameterized pure function; it changes no schema, persisted format, and backfills no data. The T11 overlay does not apply to non-persisted/in-memory changes. No findings.
